mapper.sql: ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT fin_prdt_cd, save_trm AS max_save_trm, intr_rate AS max_intr_rate, intr_rate2 AS max_intr_rate2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY fin_prdt_cd ORDER BY -- 12개월이 가장 우선순위, 없으면 긴 순서 CASE WHEN save_trm = 12 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, save_trm DESC ) AS rn FROM deposit_option ) tmp WHERE rn = 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT dp.kor_co_nm AS bank_name, dp.fin_prdt_nm AS product_name, dp.etc_note AS etc_note, opt.max_save_trm, opt.max_intr_rate, opt.max_intr_rate2 FROM deposit_product dp LEFT JOIN opt ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = opt.fin_prdt_cd ORDER BY dp.kor_co_nm, dp.fin_prdt_nm

SELECT dp.kor_co_nm as bank_name, dp.fin_prdt_nm as product_name, dp.etc_note as etc_note, opt.max_save_trm, opt.max_intr_rate, opt.max_intr_rate2 FROM deposit_product dp LEFT JOIN opt ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = opt.fin_prdt_cd AND opt.rn = 1 WHERE dp.kor_co_nm = #{bankName} ORDER BY dp.fin_prdt_nm

SELECT dp.kor_co_nm as bank_name, dp.fin_prdt_nm as product_name, dp.etc_note as etc_note, opt.max_save_trm, opt.max_intr_rate, opt.max_intr_rate2 FROM deposit_product dp LEFT JOIN opt ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = opt.fin_prdt_cd AND opt.rn = 1 WHERE dp.fin_prdt_cd = #{productCode}

SELECT DISTINCT dp.kor_co_nm as bank_name, dp.fin_prdt_nm as product_name, dp.etc_note as etc_note, do2.save_trm as max_save_trm, do2.intr_rate as max_intr_rate, do2.intr_rate2 as max_intr_rate2 FROM deposit_product dp INNER JOIN deposit_option do1 ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = do1.fin_prdt_cd LEFT JOIN ( SELECT fin_prdt_cd, save_trm, intr_rate, intr_rate2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY fin_prdt_cd ORDER BY save_trm DESC) as rn FROM deposit_option ) do2 ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = do2.fin_prdt_cd AND do2.rn = 1 WHERE do1.save_trm = #{saveTrm} ORDER BY do2.intr_rate DESC, dp.kor_co_nm
